How it works

Built for those who are
just starting.

01

Publish your Daily

A photo + up to 1,000 characters. Written for real — no paste allowed. Your day, your voice.

02

Build your Circle

Invite people you trust. They get exclusive access to your private videos and long-form blog — just for them.

03

Stack your weeks

Every week is automatically archived. In 6 months, you have a real portfolio of your journey.

04

Grow with confidence

When you're ready, take your content, voice and consistency to any platform — with a solid foundation.

What you get

Four spaces.
One journey.

📸

Public Daily

Photos + your day in text. Appears on the general timeline and your personal wall. No pasting — everything written for real.

up to 1,000 characters
🎥

Circle Daily

Exclusive videos for your Circle. Visible for 7 days then automatically archived by week.

up to 3 min · horizontal format
✍️

Blog & Journal

Write more. Public Blog up to 1,000 characters. Circle Blog, exclusive to your invited people, up to 3,000.

public + circle

Why YOUNE exists

It's not a social network.
It's where you become
a creator.

✍️

No pasting. Every word is typed. Because here, authenticity is not optional.

📅

No algorithm. Pure chronological timeline. Your content reaches who matters, in the order it happened.

🗂️

No lost memories. Every week is archived. A year from now, you have your entire journey documented.

🔒

No pressure. You decide what's public and what's only for your Circle. Start slow, with who you trust.

Week system

Your journey,
week by week.

Every video you publish in your Circle Daily stays visible for 7 days. Then it's automatically saved in that week's folder — forever. In 3 months, you have 12 weeks of built history.

▶Current Week3 videoslive
📁Week 47 videossaved
📁Week 35 videossaved
📁Week 26 videossaved
📁Week 1 · origin4 videossaved

Plans

Start free.
Grow when you're ready.

YOUNE is open from age 14. Free for everyone. From 16+, unlock Creator or Pro and build your audience on your terms.

YOUNE Starter

Free forever

For anyone who wants to build their story, at their own pace, with who they choose. Available from age 14.

  • ✦Public Daily with photos and text
  • ✦Public Blog — up to 1,000 characters
  • ✦Circle Daily — videos up to 3 min
  • ✦Circle Blog — up to 3,000 characters
  • ✦Full week archive
  • ○Public searchable profile
  • ○Followers from the platform
🔒 Ages 14–15: this plan only
✦ For creators

YOUNE Creator

R$ 29,90/mês

For those ready to be found and build an audience inside YOUNE. Available from age 16+.

  • ✦Everything in Starter
  • ✦Public searchable profile
  • ✦Followers — no limit
  • ✦Appears in platform search
  • ✦Reach & engagement stats
  • ✦Verified Creator badge
  • ○Live streaming
  • ○Videos up to 5 min
✦ From age 16 — unlock your audience

YOUNE Pro

R$ 57,90/mês

For course creators, coaches and entrepreneurs who sell and need a real community to connect with students and clients.

  • ✦Everything in Creator
  • ✦Videos up to 5 min in Circle
  • ✦Live streaming for your Circle
  • ✦Multiple Circles (courses, communities)
  • ✦Sales link on public profile
  • ✦Custom presentation page
  • ✦Advanced Circle analytics
🚀 For entrepreneurs & educators 16+
How it works by age
AgePlanDaily + Blog + CirclePublic profile
14 – 15 yearsStarter✓Full access✗Not available
16+ yearsStarter✓Full access✗Circle only
16+ yearsCreator✓Full access✓Public + followers
16+ yearsPro✓Full + 5min + live✓Public + community

YOUNE Starter — you exist for your Circle.
YOUNE Creator — you exist for the whole platform.
YOUNE Pro — you build a real community around what you create and sell.
